description: This black group is alive as it stands. If not used for ko threats, it will remain unchanged until the endgame. However, when white plays hane, black must take care.
sgf:
(;AW[or][nq][pq][qo][on][qn][rn][pp]AB[pr][qr][qq][qp][rp][ro]
C[Please play at 'A' to start.FORCE]LB[kk:A]
;B[kk]
(;W[ps]
(;B[rr]C[The standard reply to hane at 'Q1', is 'S2'. Other  replies take less territory, leave aji, become ko, or die.  CHOICERIGHT])
(;B[sr]C[Please see problem 2695 for why this is inferior for Black.])
(;B[rs]C[Black lives, but takes 1 point less territory than the correct reply.])
(;B[sq]C[Black lives, but takes 1 point less territory than the correct reply.])
(;B[qs];W[rr];B[sr];W[sq];B[rs]C[A bad ko for black.]))

(;W[so]
(;B[sr]C[The standard reply to hane at 'T5', is 'T2'. Other replies take less territory, lead to seki, become ko, or die. CHOICERIGHT])
(;B[sp];W[ps];B[qs];W[sr];B[rr];W[sq];B[ss];W[rs]C[A bad ko for black.])
(;B[rr];W[sq];B[sp];W[sr];B[ps];W[rs]C[Seki.])
(;B[rs];W[ps];B[sq]C[Black lives, but takes 1 point less territory than the correct reply.])
(;B[sq];W[ps]
(;B[rr]C[Black lives, but takes less territory than the correct reply.])
(;B[qs];W[rr]C[Black dies.])
(;B[rs]C[Black lives, but takes 1 point less territory than the correct reply.]))))
